# AT+CMGS responses — SMS send result
# The send sequence is: AT+CMGS=<length>\r  →  > (prompt)  →  <pdu>\x1A  →  +CMGS: <mr>\r\nOK
# or  +CMS ERROR: <err>

# Successful send, message reference 1
+CMGS: 1
OK

# Successful send, message reference 42
+CMGS: 42
OK

# Send failure — network out of service
+CMS ERROR: 38

# Send failure — memory capacity exceeded on network
+CMS ERROR: 322

# Send failure — SIM not inserted
+CMS ERROR: 10

# Send failure — FDN (Fixed Dialling Number) restriction
+CMS ERROR: 312

# Timeout / no response from modem (hardware stall scenario)
# (no response — serializer returns ErrTimeout)

# Multi-part send, first segment
+CMGS: 10
OK

# Multi-part send, second segment
+CMGS: 11
OK
